title: begonia subacida
intro: Begonia subacida, also known as Begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Begonia subacida include treating fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions, as well as providing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and salves.
